settings.head: Woven in Devotion, Rooted in Banaras
settings.deesc:
Banaras is not just a city, it is a feeling. A land where devotion flows like the Ganga, and every thread is blessed with tradition.
Our sarees are handwoven by skilled artisans of Banaras, whose craft has been passed down through generations.
Each weave is a tribute to the timeless beauty, spirituality and heritage of this sacred city

settings.label: Our Story
settings.headline:
Woven in Devotion,
Rooted in Banaras
settings.body_text_1: Banaras is not just a city — it is a feeling. A land where devotion flows like the Ganga, and every thread is blessed with centuries of living tradition.
settings.body_text_2: Our sarees are handwoven by skilled artisans whose craft has been passed down through generations. Each weave is a tribute to the timeless beauty, spirituality, and heritage of this sacred city.
settings.quote_text: Every saree carries the soul of Banaras — from the ghats to the loom, from prayers to patterns, woven in devotion.

settings.head: Handcrafted excellence from our INDIA factory to your home.
settings.deesc: Sanskriti Sarees Pvt Ltd. is a retail chain company in business since 1970, which caters to the ever increasing needs of Indian women for the newest design and collections of ready-made suits, sarees, lehengas and fabric pieces.

settings.text: It’s a story of culture, confidence, and individuality — woven into every thread for the woman who carries tradition with her own style.

settings.head: Handcrafted excellence from our INDIA factory to your home.
settings.deesc: Sanskriti Sarees Pvt Ltd. is a retail chain company in business since 1970, which caters to the ever increasing needs of Indian women for the newest design and collections of ready-made suits, sarees, lehengas and fabric pieces.

settings.title: The First Loom
settings.description: Our founder established a single handloom unit in Bhelupur, dedicated to reviving the Shikargarh technique.

settings.title: Royal Patronage
settings.description: SanskritiSaree becomes the preferred weaver for regional heritage houses across Rajasthan and UP.

settings.title: Global Recognition
settings.description: SanskritiSaree showcased at the Paris Heritage Exhibition, bringing Banaras silk to the international haute couture stage.

settings.title: Digital Atelier
settings.description: Launching our virtual private viewing experience, connecting global connoisseurs directly with the loom.

settings.section_sub: Five decades of heritage, craft and passion.

settings.title: 100% Natural Silk
settings.description: Pure mulberry and tussar silk, free from syntheticpolymers and harmful chemical coatings.

settings.title: Ethical Sourcing
settings.description: Direct-from-weaver partnerships that ensure livingwages and preserve heritage skills.

settings.title: Zero-Waste Atelier
settings.description: Utilizing textile off-cuts for handcraftedaccessories and eco-friendly packaging.

settings.heading: Become Part of the Story
settings.text:
Explore our latest curation of hand-loomed heritage, where each thread tells a tale of
timeless elegance.
Be the first to know about new collections and exclusive offers.
